notices.text: Admissions now open for Hifz College and Edu Village 2026-2027! Apply online via the Admissions portal.
Last date for submitting Hifz College applications is March 31, 2026.
Upcoming Event: Annual Islamic Conference to be held next month.
Important parent-teacher meeting for CBSE students on the upcoming Saturday.

institutions.name: Annasr Global Academy - Da'wa College
institutions.description: Annasr Global Academy provides quality education that seamlessly integrates both essential Islamic teachings and comprehensive modern studies. Our Arabic Villa serves as the +1 and +2 boys campus.

institutions.name: Zawiyathul Qur'an - Hifz College
institutions.description: Zawiyathul Qur'an is an esteemed institution dedicated exclusively to the memorization and deep understanding of the Holy Qur'an. Students are guided by expert mentors to perfect their recitation.

institutions.name: Edu Village - HS boys campus
institutions.description: Edu Village is our dedicated HS boys campus combining rigorous academic curriculum with profound Islamic teaching to shape young minds in a collaborative, supportive environment.

institutions.name: Women's College (+1 to UG)
institutions.description: Our Women's College empowers female students through higher education from +1 to UG degrees in both Islamic and secular fields in a secure, supportive environment.

institutions.name: Olive Garden HS Girls School
institutions.description: Olive Garden is our dedicated High School for girls, providing an empowering, secure environment combining modern education with core Islamic values.

institutions.name: Al Madrasathul Mahmoodiyya
institutions.description: Al Madrasathul Mahmoodiyya focuses on nurturing young minds with core moral values and academic excellence. It serves as the starting point for children to understand the fundamental principles of Islam.

institutions.name: Mahmoodiyya English School - CBSE school
institutions.description: Mahmoodiyya English School follows the CBSE curriculum, offering a competitive, high-standard secular education within a safe, Islamic environment.

institutions.name: Thibyan Pre School
institutions.description: Thibyan Pre School creates a nurturing beginning for the youngest members of our community, instilling early Islamic morals with modern play-based learning.

institutions.name: Smart Seed Premium Preschool
institutions.description: Smart Seed Premium Preschool provides a nurturing, playful, and high-end early childhood education experience. We focus on building a strong intellectual and moral foundation for toddlers.

institutions.name: IBES
institutions.description: IBES provides advanced educational services and structured learning environments to promote excellence across varied academic pursuits.

institutions.name: Masajid
institutions.description: The heart of our institution, the Masajid (Masjid Swahaba, Mahmoodiyya Juma Masjid Moonnupeedika, Masjid Hamdha wa Avathif), provide a serene and spiritual environment for daily prayers and community gatherings.

faculty.name: Nasrudheen Darimi Ustad
faculty.bio: A visionary leader dedicated to the spiritual and academic growth of the community.

faculty.name: Haseen Nurani Ustad
faculty.bio: Overseeing the institutional development and ensuring excellence in education.
